heading: Availability of facilities and appropriations
label: 4104 Availability of facilities and appropriations
text: The services and facilities of and appropriations for the Coast Guard shall be available to effectuate the purposes of the Reserve and the Auxiliary.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on title 14, U.S.C., 1946 ed., § 354 (, title III, § 304, ).Feb. 19, 1941, ch. 855 Stat. 14Changes were made in phraseology. 81st Congress, House Report No. 557.
Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–282section 894 of this title
